      p99: 4000
    },
    throughputRps: 100,
    costPerHour: 0.20,
    maxConnections: 1000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Workflow orchestration – DAG-based pipeline scheduling.',
    tags: ['platform', 'orchestration', 'airflow', 'workflow']
  },
  zookeeper: {
    type: 'zookeeper',
    label: 'Apache Zookeeper',
    category: 'platform',
    icon: '🦁',
    color: '#f59e0b',
    textColor: '#ffffff',
    latencyMs: {
      min: 1,
      avg: 5,
      max: 20,
      p99: 15
    },
    throughputRps: 10000,
    costPerHour: 0.05,
    maxConnections: 5000,
    horizontallyScalable: false,
    description: 'Distributed coordination service – leader election, config management.',
    tags: ['platform', 'coordination', 'zookeeper']
  },
  consul: {
    type: 'consul',
    label: 'Consul (Service Discovery)',
    category: 'platform',
    icon: '🧭',
    color: '#e03875',
    textColor: '#ffffff',
    latencyMs: {
      min: 0.5,
      avg: 2,
      max: 10,
      p99: 8
    },
    throughputRps: 20000,
    costPerHour: 0.08,
    maxConnections: 10000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Service mesh & discovery, health checking, key-value store.',
    tags: ['platform', 'service-mesh', 'discovery', 'consul']
  },
  vault: {
    type: 'vault',
    label: 'HashiCorp Vault',
    category: 'platform',
    icon: '🏦',
    color: '#ffc107',
    textColor: '#000000',
    latencyMs: {
      min: 1,
      avg: 5,
      max: 30,
      p99: 25
    },
    throughputRps: 10000,
    costPerHour: 0.10,
    maxConnections: 5000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Secrets management, dynamic credentials, data encryption service.',
    tags: ['security', 'secrets', 'vault']
  },
  istio: {
    type: 'istio',
    label: 'Istio / Service Mesh',
    category: 'platform',
    icon: '🕸️',
    color: '#466bb0',
    textColor: '#ffffff',
    latencyMs: {
      min: 0.5,
      avg: 2,
      max: 10,
      p99: 8
    },
    throughputRps: 50000,
    costPerHour: 0.15,
    maxConnections: 100000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Service mesh – mTLS, traffic management, observability sidecar proxy.',
    tags: ['platform', 'service-mesh', 'istio']
  },
  pulsar: {
    type: 'pulsar',
    label: 'Apache Pulsar',
    category: 'platform',
    icon: '💫',
    color: '#188fff',
    textColor: '#ffffff',
    latencyMs: {
      min: 1,
      avg: 5,
      max: 30,
      p99: 25
    },
    throughputRps: 500000,
    costPerHour: 0.20,
    maxConnections: 50000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Unified messaging and streaming – multi-tenancy, geo-replication.',
    tags: ['platform', 'messaging', 'streaming', 'pulsar']
  }
};
export default catalog;

/* Ordered sections for the palette UI */
export const PALETTE_SECTIONS = [{
  title: 'Starting Points',
  keys: ['client', 'mobile_client']
}, {
  title: 'Network',
  keys: ['cdn', 'dns', 'api_gateway', 'load_balancer', 'firewall', 'vpn']
}, {
  title: 'Compute',
  keys: ['web_server', 'monolithic_api', 'app_server', 'microservice', 'serverless', 'container', 'kubernetes', 'graphql']
}, {
  title: 'Data',
  keys: ['postgres', 'mysql', 'dynamodb', 'mongodb', 'redis', 'memcached', 'elasticsearch', 'cassandra', 'influxdb', 'neo4j']
}, {
  title: 'Storage',
  keys: ['object_storage', 'block_storage', 'nfs']
}, {
  title: 'Messaging',
  keys: ['message_queue']
}, {
  title: 'Platform Services',
  keys: ['kafka', 'rabbitmq', 'kafka_connect', 'spark', 'flink', 'snowflake', 'databricks', 'dbt', 'airflow', 'zookeeper', 'consul', 'vault', 'istio', 'pulsar']
}, {
  title: 'Observability',
  keys: ['monitoring', 'logging', 'tracing']
}];

sourcesContent:
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   componentCatalog.ts – All component types with performance specs
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
import { ComponentSpec } from '../types';

const catalog: Record<string, ComponentSpec> = {

  /* ── CLIENT ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  client: {
    type: 'client',
    label: 'Client / Browser',
    category: 'client',
    icon: '💻',
    color: '#e0e7ff',
    textColor: '#3730a3',
    latencyMs: { min: 0, avg: 0, max: 0, p99: 0 },
    throughputRps: Infinity,
    costPerHour: 0,
    maxConnections: Infinity,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Browser or mobile client that initiates requests.',
    tags: ['entry', 'client'],
  },

  mobile_client: {
    type: 'mobile_client',
    label: 'Mobile Client',
    category: 'client',
    icon: '📱',
    color: '#e0e7ff',
    textColor: '#3730a3',
    latencyMs: { min: 0, avg: 0, max: 0, p99: 0 },
    throughputRps: Infinity,
    costPerHour: 0,
    maxConnections: Infinity,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Native mobile app.',
    tags: ['entry', 'client', 'mobile'],
  },

  /* ── NETWORK ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  cdn: {
    type: 'cdn',
    label: 'CDN',
    category: 'network',
    icon: '🌐',
    color: '#fef3c7',
    textColor: '#92400e',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 5, max: 20, p99: 15 },
    throughputRps: 500_000,
    costPerHour: 0.01,
    maxConnections: 1_000_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Content delivery network – caches static assets at edge PoPs.',
    tags: ['network', 'cache', 'edge'],
  },

  dns: {
    type: 'dns',
    label: 'DNS',
    category: 'network',
    icon: '🔍',
    color: '#fef3c7',
    textColor: '#92400e',
    latencyMs: { min: 0, avg: 1, max: 5, p99: 4 },
    throughputRps: 1_000_000,
    costPerHour: 0.005,
    maxConnections: 10_000_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Domain Name System – resolves hostnames.',
    tags: ['network', 'dns'],
  },

  api_gateway: {
    type: 'api_gateway',
    label: 'API Gateway',
    category: 'network',
    icon: '🚪',
    color: '#fef3c7',
    textColor: '#92400e',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 3, max: 15, p99: 12 },
    throughputRps: 50_000,
    costPerHour: 0.035,
    maxConnections: 100_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Handles routing, auth, rate-limiting, and SSL termination.',
    tags: ['network', 'gateway', 'auth', 'routing'],
  },

  load_balancer: {
    type: 'load_balancer',
    label: 'Load Balancer',
    category: 'network',
    icon: '⚖️',
    color: '#fef3c7',
    textColor: '#92400e',
    latencyMs: { min: 0.2, avg: 0.5, max: 2, p99: 1.5 },
    throughputRps: 200_000,
    costPerHour: 0.02,
    maxConnections: 500_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Layer-4/7 load balancer distributing traffic across instances.',
    tags: ['network', 'lb', 'ha'],
  },

  firewall: {
    type: 'firewall',
    label: 'Firewall / WAF',
    category: 'network',
    icon: '🔥',
    color: '#fee2e2',
    textColor: '#991b1b',
    latencyMs: { min: 0.5, avg: 1, max: 5, p99: 4 },
    throughputRps: 100_000,
    costPerHour: 0.025,
    maxConnections: 500_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Web Application Firewall / network firewall filtering traffic.',
    tags: ['security', 'network'],
  },

  vpn: {
    type: 'vpn',

    category: 'network',
    icon: '🔒',
    color: '#fef3c7',
    textColor: '#92400e',

    throughputRps: 5_000,
    costPerHour: 0.05,
    maxConnections: 5_000,

    description: 'Site-to-site or client VPN gateway.',
    tags: ['security', 'network'],
  },

  /* ── COMPUTE ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */

    type: 'web_server',

    icon: '🌍',
    color: '#d1fae5',

  app_server: {

    icon: '⚙️',

  microservice: {

    maxConnections: 5_000,

  },

  serverless: {

    costPerHour: 0.06,

    horizontallyScalable: true,

  },

  container: {

    throughputRps: 8_000,
    costPerHour: 0.06,
    maxConnections: 8_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Docker container – lightweight, portable compute.',
    tags: ['compute', 'docker', 'container'],
  },

  kubernetes: {
    type: 'kubernetes',
    label: 'Kubernetes Cluster',
    category: 'compute',
    icon: '☸️',
    color: '#d1fae5',
    textColor: '#065f46',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 4, max: 20, p99: 18 },
    throughputRps: 100_000,
    costPerHour: 0.40,
    maxConnections: 500_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Kubernetes CaaS cluster – auto-scales pods, high availability.',
    tags: ['compute', 'kubernetes', 'k8s', 'orchestration'],
  },

  graphql: {
    type: 'graphql',
    label: 'GraphQL Server',
    category: 'compute',
    icon: '◉',
    color: '#d1fae5',
    textColor: '#065f46',
    latencyMs: { min: 5, avg: 20, max: 100, p99: 80 },
    throughputRps: 3_000,
    costPerHour: 0.12,
    maxConnections: 3_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'GraphQL API layer – flexible querying, but N+1 risk.',
    tags: ['compute', 'graphql', 'api'],
  },

  /* ── DATA ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  postgres: {
    type: 'postgres',
    label: 'PostgreSQL',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '🐘',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 8, max: 50, p99: 40 },
    throughputRps: 5_000,
    costPerHour: 0.15,
    maxConnections: 500,
    horizontallyScalable: false,
    description: 'Relational RDBMS. Great for ACID transactions, complex queries.',
    tags: ['data', 'sql', 'relational', 'rdbms'],
  },

  mysql: {
    type: 'mysql',
    label: 'MySQL',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '🐬',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 7, max: 45, p99: 35 },
    throughputRps: 6_000,
    costPerHour: 0.12,
    maxConnections: 600,
    horizontallyScalable: false,
    description: 'Popular RDBMS. Good for read-heavy workloads with replicas.',
    tags: ['data', 'sql', 'relational', 'rdbms'],
  },

  dynamodb: {
    type: 'dynamodb',
    label: 'DynamoDB',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '⚡',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 0.5, avg: 2, max: 10, p99: 8 },
    throughputRps: 80_000,
    costPerHour: 0.25,
    maxConnections: Infinity,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'AWS DynamoDB – managed NoSQL key-value/document store. Single-digit ms latency at scale.',
    tags: ['data', 'nosql', 'dynamodb', 'managed'],

  mongodb: {
    type: 'mongodb',
    label: 'MongoDB',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '🍃',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 6, max: 30, p99: 25 },
    throughputRps: 10_000,
    costPerHour: 0.18,
    maxConnections: 1_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Document NoSQL DB. Flexible schema, horizontal sharding.',
    tags: ['data', 'nosql', 'document', 'mongodb'],
  },

  redis: {
    type: 'redis',
    label: 'Redis Cache',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '🔴',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 0.1, avg: 0.5, max: 2, p99: 1.5 },
    throughputRps: 200_000,
    costPerHour: 0.05,
    maxConnections: 65_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'In-memory cache/data store. Sub-millisecond latency, massive throughput.',
    tags: ['data', 'cache', 'redis', 'memory'],
  },

  memcached: {
    type: 'memcached',
    label: 'Memcached',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '⚙️',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 0.1, avg: 0.4, max: 1.5, p99: 1.2 },
    throughputRps: 300_000,
    costPerHour: 0.04,
    maxConnections: 10_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Simple, fast distributed memory caching.',
    tags: ['data', 'cache', 'memcached', 'memory'],

  elasticsearch: {

    category: 'data',
    icon: '🔎',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 3, avg: 15, max: 100, p99: 80 },
    throughputRps: 5_000,
    costPerHour: 0.22,
    maxConnections: 2_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Distributed search & analytics engine. Full-text search, log analysis.',
    tags: ['data', 'search', 'elasticsearch', 'analytics'],

  cassandra: {
    type: 'cassandra',
    label: 'Cassandra',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '💎',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 4, max: 20, p99: 15 },
    throughputRps: 50_000,
    costPerHour: 0.30,
    maxConnections: 5_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Wide-column NoSQL DB. Excellent write throughput, tuneable consistency.',

    label: 'InfluxDB',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '📈',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 1, avg: 3, max: 15, p99: 12 },
    throughputRps: 100_000,
    costPerHour: 0.15,
    maxConnections: 5_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,
    description: 'Time-series database for metrics, IoT data, monitoring.',
    tags: ['data', 'timeseries', 'metrics'],

  neo4j: {
    type: 'neo4j',
    label: 'Neo4j',
    category: 'data',
    icon: '🕸️',
    color: '#ede9fe',
    textColor: '#4c1d95',
    latencyMs: { min: 3, avg: 20, max: 200, p99: 150 },

  /* ── STORAGE ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */

    type: 'object_storage',
    label: 'Object Storage (S3)',
    category: 'storage',
    icon: '🪣',
    color: '#fff7ed',
    textColor: '#7c2d12',
    latencyMs: { min: 5, avg: 30, max: 200, p99: 150 },

  block_storage: {

    label: 'Block Storage (EBS)',

    icon: '💾',

  nfs: {

    icon: '📂',
    color: '#fff7ed',
    textColor: '#7c2d12',

  /* ── MESSAGING ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

    tags: ['observability', 'monitoring', 'metrics'],
  },

  logging: {
    type: 'logging',
    label: 'Log Aggregation',
    category: 'observability',
    icon: '📝',
    color: '#f0fdf4',
    textColor: '#14532d',
    latencyMs: { min: 0, avg: 0, max: 0, p99: 0 },

    costPerHour: 0.08,
    maxConnections: 10_000,

    description: 'ELK / Splunk / Datadog for centralized log aggregation.',

  },

  tracing: {
    type: 'tracing',
    label: 'Distributed Tracing',
    category: 'observability',
    icon: '🔬',
    color: '#f0fdf4',
    textColor: '#14532d',
    latencyMs: { min: 0, avg: 0, max: 0, p99: 0 },

    maxConnections: 10_000,
    horizontallyScalable: true,

    tags: ['observability', 'tracing', 'jaeger'],
  },

  /* ── PLATFORM SERVICES ───────────────────────────────────── */
  kafka: {
    type: 'kafka',
    label: 'Apache Kafka',
    category: 'platform',
    icon: 'K',
    color: '#1f2937',

  rabbitmq: {

  kafka_connect: {
